title: チューリップ賞にむけて

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've finished changing, and my legs feel
ready to race.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: The only thing left is to take home the Tulip Sho!
choice_data_list: You look like you're ready to go.
You look like you're ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But of course. I'll show everyone why I'm going to
be the number one favorite in this year's Tiara
tour―

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I heard someone yelling something about being
number one, so I figured it was you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hate to break it to you, Miss Model Student, but
this race is mine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. Look who showed up uninvited
just to mouth off.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Save your breath for the race—because you're
going down this time. I'll have you running home
in disgrace.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Say what?! You trying to pick a fight?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What are you upset about?! You're the one who came out swinging!
choice_data_list: Calm down. The race is about to start!
Calm down. The race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Her strengths play toward the Tiara tour races, so
I figured she might show up, but... But!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Like I need you to tell me that! I'm going to wipe
the floor with her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: This is the start of my Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll show them all who's really number one!
